task_description: Implement Broader Domain Cycle (Option D) for Virtual-GENESIS: add 3 new task families (analysis, extraction, planning), create 18 new tasks across these families, build domain transfer evaluation infrastructure, measure cross-domain concept generalization, and document everything using the Legitimate Theft methodology in Arabic.

verification.summary: 163 tests pass (126 existing + 37 new). Eval runner executes and produces valid results. Classification match rate 0.83 on new families. All documentation created with 6 new thefts (5.39-5.44).
